config.content.title: We keep support focused and privacy friendly
config.content.description: Share only the details needed to help with your request. No marketing messages or promises of winnings are provided.
config.features.items:
App installation|Help with downloads, versions, and permission prompts.|📱
Format clarification|Questions about single, jodi, and panna results.|📊
Result review|Report a mismatch in posted satta king results.|🔍
Support hours|Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM IST. We aim to respond within 24 hours.|⏰
Email response|Get help via email with clear documentation.|📧
Ticket tracking|Track your support request status.|🎫
